task_completion.description: Verify the document header contains the required title information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document for the District Name ('Maplewood Consolidated School District #18'), Document Title ('Certified Staff Compensation Schedule' or similar), and Fiscal Year ('2024-2025').

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of an automated Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block near the beginning of the document that lists the sections and page numbers, typically with a grey background indicating it is an auto-generated field in LibreOffice Writer.

task_completion.description: Verify the document has the three required distinct sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct headings (likely formatted as Heading 1) for 'Salary Schedule', 'Extra-Duty Stipends', and 'Benefits'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Salary Schedule section contains a 12-step by 6-lane table with correct data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table in the Salary Schedule section with 12 rows for steps and 6 columns for lanes (plus headers). Check for specific values like 42,500, 72,835, and 84,750 inside the grid.

task_completion.description: Verify the Extra-Duty Stipends and Benefits sections contain tables with correct data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least two additional tables: one under Extra-Duty Stipends (containing values like 6,200 for Head Coach) and one under Benefits.

task_completion.description: Verify page numbers are included in the document footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin (footer) of the document pages for visible page numbers.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the word processor or a file manager window to confirm the file is saved as 'Maplewood_Salary_Schedule_2024_2025.odt' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Check that a GUI word processor was used to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing LibreOffice Writer or a similar word processor being actively used, rather than a terminal script generating the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Check that the agent accessed the input JSON file to retrieve the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent opening, viewing, or querying 'district_compensation_data.json' (e.g., in a text editor, terminal, or browser).

integrity.description: Check that the agent used genuine table structures rather than plain text formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for table gridlines, table formatting toolbars, or table properties dialogs being used, ensuring the data is not just separated by spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Maplewood_Salary_Schedule_2024_2025.odt'. The input data comes from '/home/ga/Documents/district_compensation_data.json'. The district name is 'Maplewood Consolidated School District #18'. The document must contain exactly 3 tables: a 12x6 Salary Grid, an Extra-Duty Stipends table, and a Benefits table. Key values to verify in the tables: 42500 (Step 1 BA), 72835 (Step 12 MA), 84750 (Step 12 EdD/PhD), and 6200 (Head Football Coach stipend). The document must have an automated Table of Contents and page numbers in the footer.
